owner_boundary.summary: Lode declares success conditions and output shape only. Core decides when to run the check and Harbor owns live source and evidence refs.

status_meaning.passed: Required public fields are present and bound to declared source/evidence refs.
status_meaning.failed: One or more required public fields or bindings are missing or inconsistent.
status_meaning.skipped: The check did not run because an upstream admission or runtime condition was not met.

result_contract.reason_policy: Always provide a short human-readable reason for the status.
result_contract.source_ref_policy: Use source ref ids declared by the fixture or Core result source refs.
result_contract.evidence_ref_policy: Use evidence ref ids declared by the fixture or Harbor/Core evidence refs; do not inline evidence bodies.
result_contract.submitted_policy: submitted must be present and exactly false; missing or true fails closed.

requirements.description: The normalized result identifies the BOSS 直聘 write-precheck target as located.
The normalized result declares expected change, risk hints, and confirms no external submission.
Each required normalized public field has a source ref and evidence ref binding.

fixture_post_check_output.reason: The redacted fixture contains required write-precheck fields and binds them to declared source and evidence refs.

failure_boundary.preview_unavailable: Expected change, risk hint, or no-submit guard fields are absent or inconsistent.
failure_boundary.page_changed: Harbor/Core report that target refs no longer match the preview source.
failure_boundary.user_cancelled: The user cancels the preview or later approval before any external submit.
failure_boundary.post_check_failed: Required public result fields or ref bindings are absent or inconsistent.
failure_boundary.mapping_incomplete: A required normalized field is not traceable to declared source/evidence refs.
failure_boundary.evidence_unavailable: Required evidence refs are absent, expired, or not retained by the runtime owner.
failure_boundary.login_required: The current runtime identity is not sufficient to locate the write-precheck target.
failure_boundary.permission_insufficient: The current identity cannot use the target page or communication/editor surface.
failure_boundary.target_not_writable: The target page or entry point is unavailable for precheck preview.
failure_boundary.safety_challenge: The site presents a safety challenge that requires human handling.

non_goals: No Harbor evidence schema or live evidence body.
No runtime session, profile, provider, cookie, token, DOM, HAR, screenshot body, production payload, or user business data.
